title: Don Juan in Sicily

actors: Lando Buzzanca, Katia Moguy, Katia Christine
plot: Giovanni Percolla lives in Catania surrounded by the attentive cares of his three sisters. He permanently acts like a Don Giovanni to hide his real poor "knowledge" of women. With his friend he moves also to Rome but women still c...
